sqlCommand.descr: delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex1 = c.SAPname from TransX t inner join Companies c on t.CO = c.CO where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Hierarchy = p.Hierarchy, PCdesc = p.Descr from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR  where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set TPname = c.Name from TransX t inner join TPs c on t.TP = c.TP where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = b.Name from TransX t inner join Brokers b on t.ReinName = b.Broker where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set BusCatDesc = m.Descr from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.BusCat = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Table_ID = 'BusCat'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, PC, Pcdesc, TP, TPname,UWYR,ReinName, Flex2, BusCat, BusCatDesc, Contract, Hierarchy, Amt1) (select '[batchID]-data2', GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, PC, Pcdesc, TP, TPname,UWYR,ReinName, Flex2, BusCat, BusCatDesc, Contract, Hierarchy, Amt1  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')

update TransX set Period = 1, Flex3 = m.Field2, Amt2 = cast(m.Field3 as float) from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and cast(t.Contract as varchar(15)) + ';' + cast(t.UWYR as varchar(4)) = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB' and m.Field1 = '1'

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, PC, Pcdesc, TP, TPname,UWYR,ReinName, Flex2, BusCat, BusCatDesc, Contract, Hierarchy, Amt1,Period,Flex3,Amt2) (select t.KeyID, t.GL, t.Gldesc, t.Co, t.Flex1, t.PC, t.Pcdesc, t.TP, t.TPname,t.UWYR,t.ReinName, t.Flex2, t.BusCat, t.BusCatDesc, t.Contract, t.Hierarchy, t.Amt1, 2, m.Field2, cast(m.Field3 as float)  from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and cast(t.Contract as varchar(15)) + ';' + cast(t.UWYR as varchar(4)) = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB' and m.Field1 = '2' and t.Period = 1)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, PC, Pcdesc, TP, TPname,UWYR,ReinName, Flex2, BusCat, BusCatDesc, Contract, Hierarchy, Amt1,Period,Flex3,Amt2) (select t.KeyID, t.GL, t.Gldesc, t.Co, t.Flex1, t.PC, t.Pcdesc, t.TP, t.TPname,t.UWYR,t.ReinName, t.Flex2, t.BusCat, t.BusCatDesc, t.Contract, t.Hierarchy, t.Amt1, 3, m.Field2, cast(m.Field3 as float)  from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and cast(t.Contract as varchar(15)) + ';' + cast(t.UWYR as varchar(4)) = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB' and m.Field1 = '3' and t.Period = 1)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, PC, Pcdesc, TP, TPname,UWYR,ReinName, Flex2, BusCat, BusCatDesc, Contract, Hierarchy, Amt1,Period,Flex3,Amt2) (select t.KeyID, t.GL, t.Gldesc, t.Co, t.Flex1, t.PC, t.Pcdesc, t.TP, t.TPname,t.UWYR,t.ReinName, t.Flex2, t.BusCat, t.BusCatDesc, t.Contract, t.Hierarchy, t.Amt1, 4, m.Field2, cast(m.Field3 as float)  from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and cast(t.Contract as varchar(15)) + ';' + cast(t.UWYR as varchar(4)) = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB' and m.Field1 = '4' and t.Period = 1)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, PC, Pcdesc, TP, TPname,UWYR,ReinName, Flex2, BusCat, BusCatDesc, Contract, Hierarchy, Amt1,Period,Flex3,Amt2) (select t.KeyID, t.GL, t.Gldesc, t.Co, t.Flex1, t.PC, t.Pcdesc, t.TP, t.TPname,t.UWYR,t.ReinName, t.Flex2, t.BusCat, t.BusCatDesc, t.Contract, t.Hierarchy, t.Amt1, 5, m.Field2, cast(m.Field3 as float)  from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and cast(t.Contract as varchar(15)) + ';' + cast(t.UWYR as varchar(4)) = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB' and m.Field1 = '5' and t.Period = 1)

insert into TransX (KeyID, GL, Gldesc, Co, Flex1, PC, Pcdesc, TP, TPname,UWYR,ReinName, Flex2, BusCat, BusCatDesc, Contract, Hierarchy, Amt1,Period,Flex3,Amt2) (select t.KeyID, t.GL, t.Gldesc, t.Co, t.Flex1, t.PC, t.Pcdesc, t.TP, t.TPname,t.UWYR,t.ReinName, t.Flex2, t.BusCat, t.BusCatDesc, t.Contract, t.Hierarchy, t.Amt1, 6, m.Field2, cast(m.Field3 as float)  from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and cast(t.Contract as varchar(15)) + ';' + cast(t.UWYR as varchar(4)) = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB' and m.Field1 = '6' and t.Period = 1)

update TransX set Period = 1, Flex3 = m.Field2, Amt2 = 100 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and m.Descr like cast(t.Contract as varchar(15)) + ';%' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB' and m.Field1 = '1' and t.Period is NULL
update TransX set Period = 1, Flex3 = m.Field2, Amt2 = 100 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.PC = m.ID where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB-PC' and t.Period is NULL

update TransX set Period = 1, Flex3 = m.Field2, Amt2 = 100 from TransX t inner join Misc_Tables m on t.Co = m.ID and t.TP = m.Descr where KeyID = '[batchID]' and m.Table_ID = 'LOB-TP' and t.Period is NULL
update TransX set Period = 1, Flex3 = '9999', Amt2 = 100 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Period is NULL
update TransX set Amt3 = round(Amt1/100*Amt2,2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'

sqlSelect.descr: insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, BusCat,TP,Contract,UWYR,ReinName, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
